title: 信息图可视化设计
description: A realistic photo of a Chinese high school math exam paper, printed inblack and white on slightly gray paper, titled “数学试卷”, with multiplechoice questions and math formulas, including a small 3D geometrycube diagram. The
prompt_raw: A realistic photo of a Chinese high school math exam paper, printed inblack and white on slightly gray paper, titled “数学试卷”, with multiplechoice questions and math formulas, including a small 3D geometrycube diagram. The paper is photographed casually with asmartphone, slightly tilted, with uneven lighting, soft shadows, andminor blur. The text is in Chinese with a mix of bold title font andstandard serif body font. Realistic paper texture, exam layout,authentic classroom test sheet style.
prompt_preview: A realistic photo of a Chinese high school math exam paper, printed inblack and white on slightly gray paper, titled “数学试卷”, with multiplechoice questions and math formulas, including a small 3D geometrycube diagram. The
prompt_display_cn: 这是一张真实感很强的试卷照片，重点不是干净排版，而是模拟手机随手拍到的一张纸质考试卷：灰白纸张、黑白打印、轻微倾斜、光照不均、软阴影和小幅模糊。适合做试卷、表格、课堂材料、文档拟真图。
prompt_template_cn: 生成一张真实手机随手拍摄的【试卷类型】照片。纸张为【纸张颜色/质感】，黑白打印，标题写【试卷标题】。试卷内容包含【题型列表】，并出现【公式/图形元素】，例如几何图、坐标图或表格。画面像在教室或桌面上随手拍摄，纸张轻微倾斜，光照不均，有柔和阴影和轻微模糊。文字使用【文字语言】，标题较醒目，正文为标准试卷字体。整体要有真实纸张纹理和课堂考试卷风格，不要像完美电子排版。
variables_json: [{"key":"试卷类型","label":"试卷类型","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"纸张颜色/质感","label":"纸张颜色/质感","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"试卷标题","label":"试卷标题","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"题型列表","label":"题型列表","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"公式/图形元素","label":"公式/图形元素","type":"text","required":true},{"key":"文字语言","label":"文字语言","type":"text","required":true}]
